description: Unified project-local skill activation triggers for Claude Code. Controls when skills automatically suggest or block actions in this workspace.

frontend-dev-guidelines.description: React/TypeScript patterns, Suspense, TanStack Query/Router. For styling use ui-styling skill.

chrome-devtools.description: Direct wrapper around chrome-devtools-mcp plugin for browser automation, screenshots, console, network, Lighthouse.

code-refactor.description: Code refactoring patterns and clean code practices

ui-styling.description: shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS styling and accessible design patterns

context7.description: Route library, framework, SDK, API, and CLI documentation questions to the locally enabled context7 plugin when available.

figma.description: Route Figma design reading, implementation, diagrams, design systems, and Code Connect tasks to the locally enabled Figma plugin when available.

github.description: Route GitHub repository, pull request, issue, review-comment, and CI investigation tasks to the locally enabled GitHub plugin when available.

playwright.description: Route browser automation, page interaction, screenshots, and end-to-end validation to the locally enabled Playwright plugin when available.

deep-research.description: Universal deep research agent team. 13-agent pipeline for rigorous academic research on any topic. 8 modes: full research, quick brief, paper review, lit-review, fact-check, three-way literature scan, Socratic guided research dialogue, and systematic review with optional meta-analysis. Covers resear

office-hours.description: Pre-development brainstorming and product reframing. YC Office Hours style forcing questions before writing code.

plan-eng-review.description: Engineering manager architecture review with diagrams, data flow, edge cases, and test matrices.

plan-design-review.description: Senior designer evaluation rating design dimensions 0-10, detecting AI slop.

investigate.description: Systematic root-cause debugging with hypothesis testing. Stops after 3 failed fixes.

refine.description: Evaluator-optimizer loop: generate, critique, apply, re-critique (bounded at 3 rounds).

remotion.description: Active-mode skill for programmatic video creation with Remotion (React-based video framework). Scaffolds projects via create-video, writes compositions, renders MP4s, and generates Veo clips via the Gemini API without per-step confirmation.

review.description: Staff engineer code review finding production bugs that pass CI, with auto-fixes.

design-review.description: Design audit with atomic commit fixes and before/after screenshots.

qa.description: Browser-based QA testing with auto-generated regression tests.

qa-only.description: QA reporting without code changes. Same methodology as /qa but report-only.

search-first.description: Search-first development: explore existing code before writing new code.

webapp-testing.description: Test local web applications using Playwright in Python. Browser screenshots, UI debugging, server lifecycle.

aiq-research.description: Strict 5-stage research pipeline (intent classify, clarify, shallow, deep, evaluate) with inline citations. Runs entirely on Claude Code tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, context7, HF MCP); no external NVIDIA AI-Q server needed.

frontend-design.description: Distinctive, intentional visual design when building new UI or reshaping an existing one. Helps with aesthetic direction, typography, and choices that do not read as templated.

impeccable.description: Design, redesign, critique, audit, polish, and harden frontend interfaces across websites, dashboards, product UI, forms, and design systems.

ui-ux-pro-max.description: UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile, with many styles, color palettes, font pairings, product types, and UX guidelines.

shadcn-ui.description: shadcn/ui component library patterns: installation, forms with React Hook Form and Zod, theming with Tailwind, and accessible component composition.

web-design-guidelines.description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance, covering accessibility, UX, and design best practices.

design-taste-frontend.description: Anti-slop frontend skill for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns. Infers the right design direction and ships interfaces that do not look templated.

image-to-code.description: Generate design images first, analyze them deeply, then implement a website that matches them closely, with clean spacious heroes.

minimalist-ui.description: Clean editorial-style interfaces with warm monochrome palette, typographic contrast, flat bento grids, and muted pastels. No gradients or heavy shadows.

industrial-brutalist-ui.description: Raw mechanical interfaces fusing Swiss typographic print with military terminal aesthetics. Rigid grids, extreme type scale contrast, utilitarian color.

gpt-taste.description: Elite UX/UI and GSAP motion direction: AIDA page structure, wide editorial typography, gapless bento grids, and strict ScrollTrigger motion.

high-end-visual-design.description: Design like a high-end agency. Defines the fonts, spacing, shadows, card structures, and animations that make a site feel expensive, blocking cheap defaults.

redesign-existing-projects.description: Upgrade existing websites and apps to premium quality. Audit current design, identify generic AI patterns, and apply high-end standards without breaking functionality.

fireworks-tech-graph.description: Turn natural language or a system description into technical diagrams (architecture, data flow, flowchart, sequence, concept map) exported as SVG and PNG.

diagram-design.description: Create technical and product diagrams as standalone HTML with inline SVG, with brand color and font extraction to reduce template feel.

web-accessibility.description: Build accessible web applications following WCAG guidelines: ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and accessibility compliance.

academic-paper.description: 12-agent academic paper writing pipeline. 11 modes (full/plan/outline/revision/revision-coach/abstract/lit-review/format-convert/citation-check/disclosure/rebuttal-audit). 6 paper types, 5 citation formats, bilingual abstracts, LaTeX/DOCX-via-Pandoc/PDF output. academic-pipeline.description: Orchestrator for the full academic research pipeline: research -> write -> integrity check -> review -> revise -> re-review -> re-revise -> final integrity check -> finalize. paper-spine.description: Write, rewrite, or build a paper or report (journal, conference, report, review, competition) end to end, then output LaTeX/PDF/Word. The main PaperSpine entry point that orchestrates every step.

paper-spine-audit.description: Audits PaperSpine outputs for missing artifacts, shallow revisions, logic transfer, unsupported claims, and translation coverage. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-build.description: Builds a paper or report from materials using the shared PaperSpine research, motivation, and rationale workflow. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-citation.description: Builds a citation support bank for Introduction, Discussion, and background claims. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-humanize.description: Reduces AI detection rates via tiered stylistic constraints mapped to real AIGC detection dimensions. Produces a teaching humanize_matrix.md. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-intake.description: Collects PaperSpine workflow options and writes config for flash/pro, scene, language, and inputs. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-latex.description: Handles LaTeX project assembly, figure placement, citations, labels, and compile-safe cleanup. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-research.description: Researches target requirements, downloads reference materials, learns strong examples, and prepares motivation options. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-rewrite.description: Rewrites an existing manuscript from confirmed motivation, research, paragraph-level rationale, and evidence. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-translate.description: Produces the complete translation_zh/ package with row-by-row translation of all required artifacts and full-paper translation. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-ui.description: Launches the PaperSpine external terminal configuration UI for Claude Code. (internal /paperspine step)

paper-spine-update.description: Checks and updates PaperSpine from GitHub while preserving global config; use for upgrades, latest-version checks, or local reinstall.

superpowers.description: Route brainstorming, planning, test-driven development, code review, debugging, and verification workflows to the locally enabled Superpowers plugin when available.
